message.content:
Remove unused code from routes, screens, services, and utils based on this list. For each file, read it first, then remove ONLY the unused items listed.

## src/routes/Models/index.ts
- Line 1: Remove unused `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`
- Line 108: Remove unused `number`
- Lines 143, 147: Remove unused HeaderEncontreProps, TabEncontreProps
- Lines 152-153, 158-159: Remove unused reducers, dispatch

## src/screens/AirlineMilesMarketplace/Models/index.ts
- Line 9: Remove unused `AirlineMilesMarketplaceParams`
- Line 21: Remove unused `event`

## src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/Models/index.ts
- Line 19: Remove unused `DESCRIPTIONS`
- Lines 64, 66, 69, 72-73: Remove unused filters, text, event, index

## src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts
- Line 23: Remove unused `getPlaceholder`

## src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx
- Line 26: Remove unused `setRefresh`
- Line 84: Remove unused `pts`, `price`

## src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/models/index.ts
- Line 29: Remove unused `InvoiceCashbackRouteProp`

## src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
- Line 10: Remove unused `CashbackInvoiceItem`

## src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts
- Lines 15, 22: Remove unused `text`
- Line 37: Remove unused `InvoiceCashbackRouteProp`

## src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/models/index.ts
- Line 10: Remove unused `pts`, `price`
- Line 40: Remove unused `InvoiceCashbackThreeRouteProp`

## src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/view.tsx
- Line 13: Remove unused `Dimensions`

## src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx
- Line 34: Remove unused `filtersPeriod`

## src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts
- Line 40: Remove unused `iso`

## src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx
- Line 2: Remove unused `Dimensions`

## src/screens/Points/Models/index.ts
- Line 34: Remove unused `value`
- Line 39: Remove unused `ModalizeProps`

## src/screens/Points/data/index.ts
- Line 62: Remove unused `POINTS_OPTIONS`

## src/screens/PointsDetail/Models/index.ts
- Line 8: Remove unused `PointsExtractProps`

## src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/Models/index.ts
- Line 18: Remove unused `event`

## src/services/additionalCard/hooks/useAdditionalCardClass.ts
- Line 3: Remove unused `useAdditionalCardClass`

## src/services/additionalCard/hooks/useAdditionalCardService.ts
- Line 3: Remove unused `useAdditionalCardService`

## src/services/additionalCard/models/index.d.ts
- Lines 27, 42-49, 55-56, 96-97: Remove unused fields

## src/services/api.ts
- Line 62: Remove unused `config`
- Line 155: Remove unused `error`

## src/settings/apiFintech.ts
- Lines 27-54, 60, 64, 68-80: Remove many unused parameters

## src/utils/formaters.ts
- Lines 8, 12, 20, 22, 24, 42, 47, 71, 74, 83: Remove unused functions/exports

## src/utils/functions.ts
- Lines 417, 430, 435: Remove unused parameters

## src/utils/masks.ts
- Line 10: Remove unused `phoneMask`

## src/components/TransactionsListFactory/mappers.ts
- Line 17: Remove unused `_`

After making all changes, confirm what was removed.

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
  Alert,
  Loading,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import { FC } from 'react';

import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import React from 'react';

const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  onConfirmRescue,
  onExitResult,
  isRescueLoading,
  isRescueConcluded,
  isRescueFailed,
  items,
  effectiveShowResult,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  formattedSelectedPoints,
  formattedSelectedReais,
  screenTitle,
  height,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title={screenTitle}
      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
        <>
          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
            <Text
              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
              type="headingMDL"
              mt="smaller"
              mb="small"
            >
              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em pontos
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedPoints}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em reais
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedReais}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              align="left"
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Cashback em
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              Até 72h
            </Text>

            <Alert
              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
              type="info"
              icon="icon-calendar"
            />
          </Box>

          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
            <Button
              text="Confirmar desconto"
              mt="large"
              mb="small"
              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
            />

            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
          </Box>
        </>
      ) : (
        <>
          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Cashback aplicado</Text>

                <Text align="center" type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Ir para o início"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-circle-alert" color="DENY_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Algo deu errado!</Text>

                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">Por favor, tente mais tarde.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Voltar"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={() => modalizeRef1.current?.close()} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;

content.content:
1→import { PropsItemsTransactionsList } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/fintech/TransactionsList/Models';
     2→import { propsItemsListCardTransition } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/organisms/ListCardTransition/Models';
     3→
     4→import theme from '../../styles/theme';
     5→
     6→export class DataGroupedByDayMapper {
     7→  public static map(
     8→    data?: PropsItemsTransactionsList[],
     9→  ): propsItemsListCardTransition[] {
    10→    if (!data) return [];
    11→
    12→    const getColors = (color?: string) => {
    13→      if (!color) return undefined;
    14→
    15→      return (
    16→        Object.entries(theme.colors).find(
    17→          ([_, value]) => value === color,
    18→        )?.[0] ?? color
    19→      );
    20→    };
    21→
    22→    return data.flatMap(({ date: label, items }) =>
    23→      items?.map((item, index) => ({
    24→        label,
    25→        showLabel: index === 0,
    26→        type: 'default',
    27→        leftIcon: item.icon,
    28→        leftIconColor: getColors(item.iconColor),
    29→        title: item.title,
    30→        titleColor: getColors(item.titleColor),
    31→        value: item.value,
    32→        valueColor: getColors(item.valueColor),
    33→        descriptionSecondary: item.description,
    34→        descriptionSecondaryColor: getColors(item.descriptionColor),
    35→        bgColor: getColors(item.bgColor),
    36→        showBackgroundLeftIcon: false,
    37→        showIcon: true,
    38→        showRightIcon: false,
    39→        lineThrough: item.icon === 'icon-corner-up-left',
    40→      })),
    41→    ) as propsItemsListCardTransition[];
    42→  }
    43→}
    44→

export type ConnectProps<
  StateT extends (_reducers: AppReducers) => object = () => object,
  DispatchT extends (_dispatch: Dispatch) => object = () => object
> = ReturnType<StateT> & ReturnType<DispatchT>;

export type ScreenProps<
  RouteName extends keyof PropsRootStack,
  StateT extends (_reducers: AppReducers) => object = () => object,
  DispatchT extends (_dispatch: Dispatch) => object = () => object
> = ConnectProps<StateT, DispatchT> & NativeStackScreenProps<PropsRootStack, RouteName>;

export type ConnectProps<
  StateT extends (_reducers: AppReducers) => object = () => object,
  DispatchT extends () => object = () => object
> = ReturnType<StateT> & ReturnType<DispatchT>;

export type ScreenProps<
  RouteName extends keyof PropsRootStack,
  StateT extends (_reducers: AppReducers) => object = () => object,
  DispatchT extends () => object = () => object
> = ConnectProps<StateT, DispatchT> & NativeStackScreenProps<PropsRootStack, RouteName>;

import { Dispatch } from 'redux';
